seo.title: Super Bowl 2020 — BEATROX Interactive AR & Projection Mapping
seo.description: Beatrox transformed Ampersand Studios in Miami into an immersive Adidas VIP headquarters for Super Bowl 2020 — featuring projection mapping, an AR mirror with real-time physics, and a Kinect Azure motion capture experience.

og.title: Super Bowl 2020 — Adidas VIP Activation Miami
og.description: Projection mapping, AR mirror, and real-time physics at Ampersand Studios Miami — Beatrox built the Adidas VIP headquarters for Super Bowl 2020.

hero.headline: Super Bowl 2020
hero.subheadline: An immersive Adidas VIP headquarters in Miami for Super Bowl weekend — projection mapping, AR mirrors, and real-time interactive experiences for sponsored athletes and partners.

metadata.type: Super Bowl 2020 Experiential Event, Projection Mapping, Interactive AR

body.heading: Design Objective
body.content: To create a headquarters for Adidas at Super Bowl 2020 in Miami that would host a VIP event for sponsored athletes and develop important brand relationships. The VIP Lounge needed to be an immersive environment that invited guests to share their experiences online and feature an art gallery.

body.heading: Projection Mapping
body.content: Ampersand Studios was transformed using projection mapping and custom content, providing Adidas with a home base for their various activations and campaigns throughout Super Bowl weekend. Custom-designed projection content wrapped the architecture of the venue in dynamic, branded visuals — pre-visualized and calibrated to the geometry of the space for a seamless result.

body.heading: Interactive AR Mirror
body.content: An AR Moment was created using a free-standing LED wall as a portal for interaction, featuring an AR overlay of the real world with a real-time physics simulation that allowed guests to interact with a digital portal. The experience was driven by interactive programming in TouchDesigner and motion capture with Microsoft Kinect Azure — creating a unique, shareable digital takeaway for every guest.

body.heading: Key Features
items: Full venue transformation via projection mapping and custom branded content
VIP lounge and art gallery environment for Adidas sponsored athletes
AR mirror: free-standing LED wall with real-time physics portal interaction
Microsoft Kinect Azure motion capture for body-driven AR interaction
AI and computer vision algorithms for gesture tracking
Custom photo booth with digital takeaway for guests
